explains_unified_memory.evidence: Explains 'no dedicated VRAM', 'CPU and GPU share the same 128GB LPDDR5X pool', rocm-smi reports 'small dedicated chunk configured in BIOS firmware'

ttm_fix.evidence: Full TTM fix: /etc/modprobe.d/increase_amd_memory.conf with pages_limit=25600000 and page_pool_size=25600000, plus temporary fix via /sys/module/ttm/parameters/pages_limit

reboot_required.evidence: sudo update-initramfs -u -k all followed by sudo reboot, plus verification step
